title: Blue Seed Beyond
synopsis: A renegade scientist in San Francisco has found a way to create a new creature called a Neo-Aragami without the power of Susanoo. When these monsters start to terrorize California, the U.S. turns to the old members of the Terrestrial Administration Center (TAC) for help. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

title: Gregory Horror Show
titleNative: グレゴリーホラーショー
synopsis: The first series is a set of 25 stories about a male businessman arriving at the hotel after taking a train home from work. He encounters the mysterious owner of the hotel, an old mouse known as Gregory, who suggests that he stay a while. Soon, the man becomes drawn into a bizarre series of events taking place within Gregory House as he tries desperately to escape from this bizarre purgatory. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Maryuu Senki
synopsis: Once upon a time, there was a certain family having strong influence on the rule of the Imperial Court. They had their own might called "Kidou" and yet got hated because of the might itself. At last, the patriarch of the family was entrapped to his death, and all the family was doomed to ruin... The present day — the survived descendants of this family, now calling themselves "Kidousyuu" schemed to resurrect their murdered patriarch once again, and the ferocious evil spell went into action.

title: Yukidoke
synonyms: Thinking and Drawing: Nihon no Shinseiki Art Animation
synopsis: The short film tells the story of a young boy, who as a result of seeing a dog's corpse, becomes interested in the bodies of living things and starts to develop phobias. Before long all manner of things begin to appear grotesque to him. (Source: Wochi Kochi)

title: Bloody Date
synopsis: Sometimes a date goes horribly wrong. A young couple ventures out on their first date only to be interrupted by a rude axe-murderer. The girl escapes to a house but her nightmare has only just begun...

title: Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Da Ren
titleRomaji: Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Da Ren
synopsis: A perpetual night of catastrophe, terror descends, and strange phenomena abound! A young man, Wang Ye, is inexplicably chosen by the "Mysterious Post Office" to serve as a "ghost messenger," awakening his special powers and repeatedly embroiling himself in dangerous and paranormal phenomena. Witness how Wang Ye pushes the envelope, dispelling the mysteries and igniting the flames of humanity's survival amidst the terrifying darkness. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Roots Search
titleNative: ルーツ・サーチ 食心物体Ｘ
synopsis: When a research crew in deep space discovers the desolate ship "Green Planet" that warps into their area, they encounter Buzz, the commander and sole surivor of the ship. Being too incapacitated to make them aware of the situation of his ship, the research team will soon discover that they have found something far, far worse... (Source: BakaBT)

title: Murder Mystery of the Dead
titleNative: マーダーミステリー・オブ・ザ・デッド
synopsis: The world has collapsed due to a zombie pandemic. The protagonist, Mikoto Amano, wakes up in an unfamiliar place with no memory and is taken in by six girls. However, a shocking incident occurs: a man who was taken in alongside Mikoto is murdered, and the culprit is one of them. Set in the Tokyu Kabukicho Tower, mysteries and secrets unfold one after another within the now-sealed building. Will the girls, who have begun to form a bond, be able to uncover the truth behind the incident? (animated Times, translated)

title: Reiwa no Dara-san
synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up to meet them- Anyway, so that's how we met Dara-san! She might look kinda scary, but just wait until you get to know her! "Look, I'm a god of misfortune, okay!? Aren't you kids gonna freak out about my grotesque visage!?" (Source: Yen Press)

title: Itou Junji: Crimson
synopsis: Crimson refers to the color crimson or bright red, and the concept of this volume is "monsters." This is a collection of horror stories that carefully selects masterpieces filled with unique madness, allowing you to immerse yourself in the eerie, bizarre, and yet original world of Junji Ito. (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Makariudo: Demon Hunter
synonyms: 魔狩人 デーモンハンター
synopsis: Forgiven of her crime of looking into the past life of the one she loved, Yama Rikudou is a powerful being from the underworld sent to the human realm to hunt demons. She must eliminate the overflowing evil here in order to provide some balance to this world. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Chimera
synopsis: The series centers on Kō Ōtori, a normal high school student who experiences a repeating dream of being eaten by a beast from inside himself. When Kō meets Reiichi Kuki, the elite student who rules his school, the encounter awakens hidden powers inside him.

title: Daimajuu Gekitou Hagane no Oni
titleNative: 大魔獣激闘　鋼の鬼
synonyms: Demon of Steel: Battle of the Great Demon Beasts
synopsis: In the year 1999, a team of UN scientists in an attempt to tap into a new energy resource on a deserted island called Sansara, unknownigly open a portal to another universe, unleashing dormant biomechanical entities. Three years later, Takuya Goroza returns to the island of Sansara urged by a mysterious request by college chum Haruka Alford. Little does he know, his old friend isn't what he appears to be... (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Eight Clouds Rising
synopsis: Fuzuchi Kuraki is a quiet young high school student blessed with immense psychic powers and an ancient sword. He is searching for other magical artifacts with the help of Nanachi Takeo, a college student with latent powers of his own. They delve deep into the dark magic of Izumo, only to discover the secrets buried within the birthplace of all Japanese mythology. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Inuki Kanako Zekkyou Collection: Gakkou ga Kowai!
titleRomaji: Inuki Kanako Zekkyou Collection: Gakkou ga Kowai!
titleNative: 犬木加奈子絶叫コレクション 学校がこわい!
synonyms: School is Dreadful! Kanako Inuki Shout Collection
synopsis: Based on the comic "Inuki Kanako Queen's Collection" by Inuki Kanako. Bukida is disliked by all the students in his class because of his unpleasant face. However, he loves a girl named Matsuko and so he stalks her. Though Matsuko rejects him, Bukida fancies she likes him at heart. One day, Bukida is killed in a traffic accident. Matsuko feels relieved. But Bukida appeared to her as the living dead. Bukida says, "I love you forever, even though I am dead!".

title: Dororon Enma-kun
synopsis: Monsters are coming to the human world from the Hell in order to get human spirits. As people's minds are getting dirty, being attracted by the dirty spirits, the monsters break the rule to go to the human world. Tsutomu, a boy who goes to Yokai Elementary School, is suddenly assaulted by monsters. Those who save him from the monsters are Enma-kun, the son of Enma, Yukiko, a snow woman, and Kapaeru. They are members of Monster Patrol that are sent to the human world to arrest monsters. (Source: AnimeNfo)

title: Judge
synopsis: Hoichiro Ohma works in an office. Everybody knows him as a silent, humble man. Even his girlfriend, Nanase, doesn't suspect that he could be something more, but he is. When a person dies as a victim of murder; when someone kills himself with a curse on his lips; when someone's death needs to be judged, he is there, for he is a Judge Of Darkness. Following the Laws Of Darkness, with a book made of human skin and an unusual parrot, he pronounces judgement over living criminals that would otherwise go free. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Zekkyou Gakkyuu: Tensei
synopsis: A girl's classmate disappears during a game of hide-and-seek. When she goes out to look for him, she hides when she hears someone pursuing her. After a while, she peeks out to see if her pursuer has given up. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Humanoid Monster Bem (2006)
synopsis: The plot of the series revolves around three youkai, Bem, Bera and Barro, who arrive at a large coastal city and come across an evil atmosphere, which was brought about by immoral behavior by humans and mischief caused by monsters and youkai. They therefore decide to stay in the city, fighting against other monsters and yōkai which attack humans, making a few friends in the way. Even though the three youkai are often abused by other human beings due to their appearance, they still strive in protecting the human populace of the city from other monsters, one day hoping to become human beings in return for their good actions.

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.
